codeReview.summary: The worker gathered solid tip-of-branch evidence, but the required baseline verification is incomplete.

issues.description: The feature claims the pre-feature baseline was green, but `handoffs/2026-04-18T00-12-23-612Z__ci-gates-verification__68b2f0a9-d22d-4a21-825c-39d5cc441698.json:66-86` records only baseline `npx prettier --check .`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run test`, `npm run build -w @slicc/webapp`, and `npm run build -w @slicc/chrome-extension`. There is no baseline `npm run build`, even though `features.json:1467` says to rerun the same gates on the parent commit and `validation-contract.md:1064` requires the baseline chain to include full `npm run build`. Without that command, VAL-CI-010 is not actually proven.
issues.suggestedFix: Check out `HEAD~1` again, run the full baseline chain including `npm run build`, record the exit code/output, and update the handoff so the baseline-green claim is backed by evidence.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission AGENTS worker checklist does not mention the full `npm run build` gate or the requirement to rerun the same gate set on the baseline commit.
sharedStateObservations.rationale: This verification feature missed the baseline full-build evidence while otherwise following mission guidance. Aligning the checklist with `features.json` / `validation-contract.md` would make the required evidence harder to overlook.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission feature metadata still describes `npx eslint .` as part of "every CI gate that ci.yml enforces", even though `validation-contract.md:1014-1018` and `.factory/library/environment.md:57-62` already document that the actual lint gate is `npx prettier --check .`.
sharedStateObservations.rationale: The contradiction caused the worker to spend time on an unnecessary ESLint run and to write stale handoff commentary about a lint-gate mismatch even though the shared library/contract had already been corrected.

summary: Review failed: the feature never recorded a baseline `npm run build`, so the claimed pre-feature green baseline is not fully evidenced. The rest of the inspected evidence on the tip commit looked consistent.
